headline: Warren Seeks Trump's $1.4B Crypto Gains Disclosure

article.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
article.summary: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

headline: US Oil Rigs Rise 7 Weeks Straight

article.title: US Oil Rig Count Notches Longest Streak Without Drop Since 2022
article.summary: Drilling in the US oil patch achieved the longest stretch without a decrease in activity in more than four years, supporting shale’s expansion amid higher prices driven by the Iran war.

headline: US Stocks Fall 2% on DeepSeek Fears

article.summary: US stocks fell on Friday as semiconductor names dipped following the reveal of an artificial-intelligence model from a Chinese startup.

headline: BIP-110 Falters as Miner Support Stays Below 1%

article.title: Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1%
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Ocean Mining VP Jason Hughes: BIP-110 on Track to Fail as Miner Signaling Stays Below 1%
Ocean Mining’s VP of Development and Engineering Jason Hughes argues BIP-110 lacks measurable consensus, with node signaling at 7-15% and hashrate support under 1% ahead of the critical block 9

headline: SBI Acquires 80% of Coinhako Amid MAS Nod

article.title: SBI Holdings Takes Majority Stake in Singapore’s Coinhako After MAS Approval
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

SBI Holdings Takes Majority Stake in Singapore’s Coinhako After MAS Approval
SBI Holdings has acquired a majority stake in Singapore's Coinhako after MAS approval, strengthening its push to build a cross-border digital asset network across Japan and Southeast Asia.
